title: Daewoo Deep Fill Omelette Maker, Dual Non-Stick Plates, Electric 750W Omelette Cooker, Fast, Fluffy Homemade Omelettes – Compact & Easy Clean Breakfast Appliance
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: Perfect Omelettes Every Time – Create thick, fluffy omelettes in minutes thanks to deep-fill cooking wells designed for generous fillings and even heat distribution
750W Fast Cooking Power – Heats quickly for effortless breakfasts, whether you're preparing a single portion or cooking for two with the dual-plate design
Non-Stick Easy Clean Plates – Food releases smoothly from the non-stick plates with minimal to no oil required, wipe clean with a damp cloth for stress-free maintenance
Compact & Safe Design – Space-saving and portable, ideal for kitchens of all sizes, student halls or caravans. Cool-touch handle and safety-ready light indicators included
Ideal for Busy Lifestyles – Great for working professionals, families, students, or anyone who wants a hot, nutritious omelette without the hassle of a frying pan

specifications_table.Special Features: ‎Cool touch handles, Non stick plates, Indicator light, Compact and lightweight, Stainless steel sleek design, Easy to clean, Versatile usage
